The System Configuration Tool

News

  • [13 April 2004] Version 0.2.
  • [24 Feb 2004] Project has been migrated to http://lincs.tigris.org.
  • [28 Aug 2003] Values can be stored in layers and notifications are delivered.
  • [13 May 2003] First site mock-up done.
